entry.data:
MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS WITH A SLIGHT CHANCE OF SHOWERS
SOME THUNDERSTORMS MAY PRODUCE HEAVY RAINFALL
NEAR STEADY TEMPERATURE IN THE LOWER 70S
SOUTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

SUNNY WITH HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR
HUMID WITH LOWS IN THE MID 70S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

SUNNY WITH HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
HIGHEST HEAT INDEX READINGS HEAT INDEX READINGS UP TO 109 IN THE AFTERNOON

CLEAR WITH LOWS IN THE MID 70S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

CLEAR, HOT
HIGHS IN THE MID 90S
LOWS IN THE MID 70S

MOSTLY CLEAR
HOT
LOWS IN THE MID 70S
HIGHS IN THE MID 90S
